creator: john@saltant.com
text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #4)

Keeping in mind that the following output is from the main system and I build ports with poudriere.

> uname -pivKU

FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE r354233 GENERIC  amd64 GENERIC 1201000 1201000

> make -C /usr/ports/lang/gcc9 -VCFLAGS -VLDFLAGS

-O2 -pipe -fno-omit-frame-pointer  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fno-strict-aliasing

> which ld as

/usr/bin/ld
/usr/bin/as

> its sometimes helpful to do provide a verbose compile of something trivial,
> perhaps audio/beep

I will attach this.

> cc -v

FreeBSD clang version 8.0.1 (tags/RELEASE_801/final 366581) (based on LLVM 8.0.1)
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd12.1
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin
